debtWelcomeMessage:
Hi,
According to our record, you have a debt in the system.
On this screen you can see the invoices open for payment, update credit and make a payment.
If there is any problem making the payment or questions about the debt you can Contact support at 03-5240290 or at support@pulseem.com< br/>Greetings, Pulseem team
paymentFailed:
We were unable to charge your credit card.
Please try again or update your saved card information
paymentSuccessful:
We are pleased to inform you that your payment has been processed successfully.
Thank you for your cooperation!
To access your account, please log in again.

Best regards,
Pulseem Team
paymentSuccessfulWithoutLogout:
We are pleased to inform you that your payment has been processed successfully.
Thank you for your cooperation!

Pulseem Team
cardInactiveSuccess: Credit Card has been successfully removed!
confirmDeleteCardText: Are you sure you want to delete Credit Card?
multipleInvoiceTypeMessage:
It is not possible to pay a transaction invoice and a tax invoice in the same payment

You can pay transaction invoices or tax invoices separately.

For more information, please contact support with Reg the payment
03-5240290
support@pulseem.com
